InfoSourcesText.html.en: This section asks some questions about how you learned about laryngeal paralysis and geriatric-onset laryngeal paralysis (LP) and polyneuropathy (GOLPP) and whether the information you found helped you make decisions for {CmpnName}. There is no right or wrong answer, so please answer as best as you can without thinking too hard about it.
InfoSourcesText.html._source: This section asks some questions about how you learned about laryngeal paralysis and geriatric-onset laryngeal paralysis (LP) and polyneuropathy (GOLPP) and whether the information you found helped you make decisions for {CmpnName}. There is no right or wrong answer, so please answer as best as you can without thinking too hard about it.
